userManagement.title: users
userManagement.description: Here you can manage your users and invite new members to your organization.
userManagement.addAnotherUser: Add another user to the organisation
userManagement.editUserDescription: Update the user's information and role.
userManagement.inviteUserDescription: Invite a new user to your organisation. The invited user will receive login information by e-mail.
userManagement.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this user from your organisation?

category.customerCategoryDescription: Here you can define your own customer categories. These are used to group and classify your customers across the workspace for better organization and targeted reporting.
category.name: name
category.addNewCategoryDescription: Create a category to group and classify customers for better reporting.

status.customerStatusDescription: Here you can create your own customer statuses. The customer statuses are available on the customer card and in filters on your customer list.
status.name: Status name
status.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this status?
